hr_data.note: Wrist-based optical HR under-read on cold days through late 2024 → Sep 2025. Coros armband ordered 2025-09-19 (delivery uncertain) is the reliable source after. wrist_optical_until is detected from HR-vs-GAP residuals bounded by the order date (see .claude/skills/shoe-speed-vs-effort/build_dataset.py); the 2026-05-29 detection run found no flag-worthy dropout after the order date, so it resolved to the order date itself. Cf. memory project_hr_monitor_wrist_unreliable.

pace_anchors.note: Pre-100k peak. Historical ceiling — informs the vo2 pace zone as 'where 5K race effort would land at full fitness', but not a current target. Re-test before treating it as today's fitness.
User-stated 2026-05-03, post-Tuscany 100k recovery. Consistent with May 2 threshold reps at ~4:25/km, HR 167-169 (activity 18341982884). Anchor for current marathon and threshold pace zones.

hr_correction._note: Drives the shoe-speed-vs-effort chart's low-HR dropout detection. enabled=true because this athlete's wrist-optical monitor under-read pre-Coros (see hr_data). The R1/R2 avg-HR ceilings are NOT here — they're read live from hr_zones (easy/steady ceilings, 140/150). Only the GAP cutoffs and R4 max-HR, which don't sit on a zone boundary, are explicit. Set enabled=false to remove dropout detection entirely.

hr_drift._note: Cardiac-drift HR adjustment for the shoe-speed-vs-effort chart. Longer-DURATION runs read a higher whole-run avg HR for the same pace (HR creeps up with time on feet), so without this they only compare within one distance band. When enabled, build_dataset fits a drift coefficient c (bpm/min) from the same trusted runs that anchor hr_correction — a Theil–Sen of the HR-vs-GAP residual on duration — and stores a duration-normalised avg_hr_adj per run; the chart then offers a 'HR axis: Raw / Drift-adjusted' toggle that composes with the distance dropdown. No coefficient is hardcoded: c and the reference duration are always fitted/derived. Needs at least min_trusted trusted runs to fit, else HR stays raw and the toggle is hidden. Defaults to hr_correction.enabled when omitted.

gear.name: Adidas Evo SL Silver
gear.notes: Size-up ultra/race-shoe candidate (bought one size up for foot swell at hour 15+) — the 'Evo SL' the rotation doc auditions for Berlin Mauerweglauf. Used for outdoor runs. Distinct from g24895470 'Adidas Evo SL' (treadmill).

gear.name: Adidas Evo SL
gear.notes: Normal-fit pair, used for treadmill runs. NOT the size-up race candidate — that's g31397925 'Adidas Evo SL Silver' (outdoor).
